dependencies.name: openssl
dependencies.$comment: on linux we use system installed OpenSSL, as determined by vcpkg-overlays/linux-syslibs)

overrides.name: libsodium
overrides.$comment: 1.0.21 breaks on linux-arm64 so we're sticking with 1.0.20 until the fix is released and available in vcpkg

overrides.name: abseil
overrides.$comment: 20260107.1 breaks on several compilers so we're sticking with 20250814.1 until a buildable version is available in vcpkg
